name: New LIMD Technology: Speed Plus Real-World Experience
alternateName: Aberdeen Group Technology Viewpoint Vol. 8 No. 15
description: Frictionless Data Package archiving Aberdeen Group Technology Viewpoint (December 1, 1995) analyzing Large-Scale In-Memory Database (LIMD) technology. Includes structured extractions of entities, technologies, benchmark observations, and market statistics from the original PDF. The study examines how Digital Equipment Corporation's 64-bit Alpha architecture and VLM64 technology combined with Oracle, Sybase, and Informix RDBMSs deliver 10-100x performance improvements for data warehousing, OLTP, and decision support workloads.

variableMeasured.name: Price/performance
variableMeasured.description: Cost per TPC-C transaction per minute

variableMeasured.name: Performance improvement ratio
variableMeasured.description: Multiplicative performance improvement from LIMD vs non-LIMD systems

variableMeasured.name: Main memory capacity
variableMeasured.description: Maximum main memory in gigabytes supported by server hardware

variableMeasured.name: CPU count
variableMeasured.description: Maximum CPU count supported in server configuration
